Rattle Empire Partner

About Prince Samuel

Prince Samuel Tarrazo is a master craftsman based in Nakasero, Kampala, specializing in tarrazo construction, grave excavation & finishing, floor grinding, and marble installation. With over 8 years of hands-on experience, Samuel has built a reputation for precision, reliability, and quality craftsmanship across residential and commercial projects in Uganda.

As a verified Rattle Empire partner, Samuel offers his services through our platform — ensuring transparent pricing, quality assurance, and professional project management from consultation to completion.

Services

Tarrazo Construction

Professional tarrazo (terrazzo) flooring — grinding, polishing, and finishing for homes, offices, and commercial spaces. Durable, elegant, and built to last.

Graves & Excavation

Respectful and professional grave excavation, headstone installation, and cemetery finishing. Precision work with care and dignity.

Floor Grinding

Industrial and residential floor grinding — surface preparation, leveling, smoothing, and polishing. Concrete, marble, and stone floors.

Marble Installation

Premium marble supply and installation for floors, walls, countertops, and decorative features. Sourced from the finest quarries.

Work Gallery
